50 Most Demanding & Best-Selling Online Products in Pakistan (2026)

By Fawad Hussain

Co-founder, Markaz

50 Most Demanding and Best Selling Online Products in Pakistan

There are a number of high demand products in Pakistan clothes, electronics, cosmetics, and more. Due to their most trending products in Pakistan status, a number of companies have started selling them online.

However, there are a few things that you need to keep in mind before selling online products in Pakistan. This includes choosing the right platform to sell on, understanding the Pakistani market, and more.

Online shopping is one of the most popular activities that Pakistani consumers engage in when they use the internet because they are always on the lookout for the unique products in Pakistan. That's why Pakistan’s eCommerce industry is the 37th largest in the world and one of the fastest growing, too.

Every day, thousands of shoppers order something or the other online. In 2021, the country’s eCommerce revenue was nearly US$ 6 billion - that’s quite telling of how lucrative a business online selling is in Pakistan.

Consumers will purchase almost anything they can online for the convenience that online shopping offers themand when it is the high demand products in Pakistan - how can they think of passing on this golden opportunity?.

After all, they’d be missing out on the unique products in Pakistan or worse, they won’t be able to get their hands on the most trending products in Pakistan.

Cue gasp.

Could you image the horror?

The post-COVID19 digital commerce landscape

When COVID-19 hit the world, almost every brick-and-mortar business in Pakistan resorted to eCommerce or social commerce channels to make sales. eCommerce businesses witnessed obvious sales growth during the pandemic, leaving little to be had for offline retail. This remains the case even today, two years down the line.

In the current post COVID-19 world, the average end buyer habitually turns to online sellers for every need. A seller’s decision to deal in the best selling products in Pakistan is the norm now, and it’s unlikely to change for the foreseeable future.

- The post COVID-19 digital commerce landscape in Pakistan looks promising with a significant rise in online spending and selling online products in Pakistan.

- The overall growth of ecommerce in the country has been supported by the increased adoption of smartphones and increasing internet penetration.

- A number of ecommerce players have emerged to meet the needs of consumers, and there is a healthy competition between them. However, if you’re thinking about launching your own online reselling business, you need to know what the most selling product in Pakistan is before you start reaching out to wholesalers to procure supplies.

In this article, we will take a look at how to sell online products in Pakistan, the top selling products in Pakistan and some tips to help you sell them successfully online.

‍How To Sell Through Online Shopping Apps in Pakistan

Are you wondering how to sell online products in Pakistan?

If so, we’ve got you covered.

Selling online products in Pakistan can be done through a variety of platforms, including e-commerce websites, social media, and online marketplaces.

Here are some steps to help you get started:

1. Choose A Platform:

Choose an e-commerce platform that is popular in Pakistan, such as Daraz, Kaymu, Markaz or Yayvo. Alternatively, you can use social media platforms such as Facebook and Instagram to sell your products.

2. Create An Account:

Once you've chosen a platform, create an account. This will typically involve providing some basic information about yourself, such as your name and email address.

3. Verify Your Account:

To ensure the security of your account, you'll need to verify your email address. This will involve clicking on a link that will be sent to your inbox.

4. List Your Products:

Once your account is set up, you can start listing your products for sale. Make sure to include detailed descriptions and high-quality optimized-images of your products.

5. Set A Price:

Decide on a competitive price for your products, taking into account factors such as the cost of the product, shipping costs, and any taxes or customs fees.

6. Promote Your Products:

Use social media and other online marketing techniques to promote your products and attract potential customers.

7. Process Orders And Ship Products:

Once you receive an order, process it promptly and ship the product to the customer.

8. Provide Customer Service:

Be available to answer any questions and address any concerns that customers may have.

Please note that depending on the platform you are using, the steps and rules may vary, make sure you read the terms and conditions before starting to sell online.

For example, with Markaz, you don’t have to worry about the inventory, packaging or shipping because you’re just reselling and that order is transferred from the to manufacturer to the consumer.

50 Most Selling Products in Pakistan

Let us now look at the list of top selling products in Pakistan 2023

1. Women’s clothing

The most selling products in Pakistan is clothing, the most popular sub-category being women’s clothing. Whether it’s ethnic or Western, local or imported, low-price or mid-range, it all sells. If you’re not already convinced, know this - in 2021, 16 million web users in Pakistan shopped online for fashion products alone, making it one of the best selling products online.

Post-COVID19, small online clothing businesses have popped up in main cities such as; Karachi, Lahore and Islamabad to meet the country’s ever-growing demand for women’s clothing. It is in fact one of the best ways to make money online in Pakistan.

For the low startup costs that come with social commerce, you’ll find countless local Facebook and Instagram pages selling women’s apparel, from the ready-to-wear shirts and lowers to traditional three-piece outfits to hand-embroidered fabric at different price points.

This means it is such an easy way to earn online without investment, especially if you’re using Markaz to do it.

There are a few reasons why women's clothing is one of the hot selling products in Pakistan.

- First, Pakistani women are trendsetters and love to keep up with the latest fashion trends hence making it the most selling products in Pakistan for women.

- Second, Pakistani women are very fashion conscious, and they love to shop for clothes not just for style sake but also for comfort.

- Third, Pakistani women have a higher disposable income than men, which allows them to purchase more expensive clothing items.

- And finally, Pakistani women are increasingly working outside the home and need comfortable clothing that can be worn both at work and at home.

2. Babies’ clothing

Babywear is another popular clothing category to sell online in Pakistan. With limited options to choose from in the offline market, most mothers turn to social commerce businesses to order entire wardrobes for their young ones. After women’s clothing, it is one of the best ways to make money online in Pakistan.

So, are you trying to understand what to sell online in Pakistan if you've narrowed down babywear as a category?

There is no one-size-fits-all answer to this question, as the types of babywear that you will need to sell will vary depending on your niche and industry. That being said, some items that you may want to stock in order to sell products online in Pakistan include:

1. Onesies - A popular item that is often sold as a diaper cover-up, Onesies are perfect for keeping your little one warm and dry during chilly weather.

2. Sleep sacks - A must-have for any new parent, sleep sacks help to keep your baby warm during the night by trapping body heat.

3. Onesies and sleep sacks - Sold together as a set, these items make a great bundle deal for parents looking for everything they need in one hit.

4. Bibs and burp cloths - Bibs and burp cloths are essential for keeping your baby clean and comfortable while they're eating or changing their diaper.

5. Blankets - A versatile item that can be used for a variety of purposes, blankets are great for keeping your baby warm during chilly weather or as a soft place to lay them down when they're sleeping.

Hopefully, these tips will help you find what you need to start shortlisting the top selling products online in Pakistan!

3. Footwear

The next most demanding product in Pakistan 2022 is footwear.  The Pakistani footwear market is massive, with a projected revenue of US$ 172.5 million by the end of 2022.

It may come as no surprise that women’s shoes is one of the best online selling products in Pakistan. Countless social commerce businesses that sell beauty and fashion products will offer women’s shoes in their product ranges.

Leather shoes used to take the lead for the longest time. What’s interesting is that one of the best products Pakistan has to offer in the footwear niche is one that people of all ages wear - sneakers. They’re a happy medium between comfort and style for everyday wear. Over the past few years, sneakers have become a fashion staple. More and more online shoe sellers introduce sneakers imported from China to their assortments at pocket-friendly prices. By the looks of things, this trend in online selling is here to stay.

Footwear has long been a favorite choice of apparel for both men and women in Pakistan. It is not surprising, then, that footwear is among the most selling products online in the country. Many people prefer to buy footwear online because it is convenient, secure, and affordable. In addition, many people believe that buying footwear online offers a variety of safety and quality assurances that are not available in brick-and-mortar stores.

4. Smartphones

The demand for smartphones in Pakistan is on the rise, and it is one of the hot selling products in Pakistan.

As per a report by Statista, the smartphone penetration rate in Pakistan was around 51% in 2020.

This growth in the smartphone market has led to an increase in the sales of smartphones through online channels and made it one of the top selling products in Pakistan.

Online retailers are some of the top e-commerce platforms in Pakistan that offer a wide range of smartphones from different brands such as Samsung, Apple, Huawei, Xiaomi, and others.

These online stores offer competitive prices, discounts, and other promotions that attract customers to purchase smartphones through their platforms.

Moreover, online shopping provides convenience, as customers can compare prices, read reviews, and make purchases from the comfort of their homes.‍

5. Jewellery

If you want to sell online in Pakistan but find fashion too competitive, try selling imitation Jewellery. It’s one of the most demanded products in Pakistan as well as one of the cheapest types of products to source, and sell.

Genuine Jewellery is far too expensive for the average customer to buy. Consider this a profitable business opportunity if you want to sell online in Pakistan.

When it comes to Jewellery, earrings are, undoubtedly, the most selling product in Pakistan. The average online shopper who’s looking for imitation Jewellery will most likely order a pair of earrings but not a necklace or bracelet. To that end, it makes complete business sense for local resellers to promote earrings in their marketing campaigns. Nonetheless, if you’re in the imitation Jewellery business, expect some quick profits to come your way.

Some tips that might be useful include:

1. Create high-quality photos - Photos are one of the most important aspects of any online store, and Jewellery sellers should definitely take this into account. Make sure to take beautiful photos of your products that accurately represent their quality.

2. Sell direct to consumers - One of the biggest benefits of selling Jewellery online is the fact that you can reach a large audience quickly and easily. This means that you don't need to waste time and money on advertising campaigns or other marketing strategies.

3. Offer free shipping - One of the main reasons people shop online is because they want to avoid spending time in stores. That's why it's important to offer free shipping on all orders over $50. This will help you retain your customers and increase your overall sales volume.

Looking to sell Jewellery online? Download the Markaz app now - it’s free.

6. Bedding

One of the best products Pakistan produces is bedding. For the past several decades, Pakistan has been known internationally for producing superior quality bedding. Locally made bed linen comes in varying degrees of quality and an impressive array of colors, designs and fabrics. There’s something for every consumer.

The greatest advantage that local sellers have is that bedding products are widely available with manufacturers at reasonable wholesale prices. Even export leftovers, commonly known as ‘rejected goods’, with minor defects sell well to local online customers.

Countless bed linen retailers source from local manufacturers and sell online in Pakistan. However, sourcing is more challenging than it sounds. Only sellers who can afford to purchase in bulk have the advantage of procuring supplies for their businesses. This leaves micropreneurs out of the mix.

If you’re a micropreneurs who wants to sell bedding with zero startup investment, download the Markaz app and become a reseller now. It’s quick, easy and free of cost.

7. Kitchenware

The sixth most selling product in Pakistan on our list is kitchenware. In a country such as Pakistan where the average age is only 22 years old, kitchenware is bound to sell in high volumes.

Kitchenware wholesalers in Pakistan import a large portion of their supplies from China in large bulk quantities at unbeatable costs. The items they supply to local sellers are made with plastic, metal, ceramic and wood. Whether it’s a set of plastic mixing bowls for everyday use, a ceramic dinner set for a bridal gift or plastic drinking vessels for office use - there’s something for everyone.

Although every local market has at least one shop that sells economical kitchenware, more often than not, the end customer will want to order online instead. Brick-and-mortar sellers are then compelled to sell online in Pakistan in order to retain the customers, making online selling the more popular mode of sales.

Are you considering selling kitchenware online? Download the Markaz app now.

8. Consumer electronics

Hair dryers, irons and hand blenders are commonplace in the average Pakistani household, and with good reason - they are necessities that enable consumers to live everyday life more conveniently. That explains why among the most selling product in Pakistan is one that falls under consumer electronics.

It is the industry norm for electronics sellers in Pakistan to import their assortments from China. Some sellers also source a handful of kitchen items such as aluminum pots and pans from local suppliers. It’s cost-effective to do both, allowing sellers to set budget-friendly prices for their products. Besides, affordability is a major consideration that Pakistan consumers account for when making a purchase decision.

A growing number of Pakistani consumers purchase small electronics everyday making it the most demanded product in Pakistan. While the local offline market offers a plethora of consumer electronics, today’s consumer turns to online shopping. It’s quick, convenient and possible anywhere. A clear business opportunity to sell online in Pakistan is presented to those who want to sell consumer electronics.

9. Beauty And Personal Care Products

Beauty and personal care products are one of the most demanded products in Pakistan.

Online stores such as Markaz offer a wide range of beauty and personal care products such as makeup, skincare, haircare, and fragrances from both local and international brands.

These online stores also offer discounts and promotions that attract customers to purchase these top selling products online through their platforms.

10. Sports And Fitness Products

Sports and fitness products are becoming one of the most demanded products in Pakistan, as more people are becoming health conscious and looking for ways to stay fit.

Online retailers such as SportsPlus.pk, Daraz, and FitnessUnlimited.pk offers a wide range of sports and fitness products such as gym equipment, sports gear, supplements, and accessories such as fitness trackers and smartwatches.

These online stores also offer competitive prices, discounts, and promotions that attract customers to purchase sports and fitness products through their platforms.

Online shopping for the best selling products online provides convenience, as customers can compare prices, read reviews, and make purchases from the comfort of their homes.

Do you want to sell small electronics online? Download the Markaz app now to become a reseller.

11. LED Submersible Lights

LED submersible lights are among the most demanded and best-selling online products in Pakistan. These LED lights are designed to be submerged in water for illumination purposes, making them an ideal choice for lighting up a pool or fountain.

LED submersible lights come in various sizes, shapes, colors, and wattages to suit different needs and preferences. These lights are energy efficient and require little maintenance, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor applications.

LED submersible lights are available at a variety of online stores in Pakistan such as BrightLights.pk, OnlineLightingStore.pk, and Markaz. These online stores offer a wide selection of LED submersible products at competitive prices, along with discounts and promotions that attract customers to purchase these lights through their platforms.

12. Scented Candles

Scented candles are among the most demanded and best-selling online products in Pakistan. These scented candles provide an inviting and warm ambiance to any interior space, while also adding a subtle scent to enhance the mood of the space.

Scented candles come in various shapes, sizes, colors, and fragrances. Popular fragrances include Lavender, Vanilla, Patchouli, and Jasmine.

Scented candles are available at a variety of online stores in Pakistan such as Markaz, CandlesOnline.pk, and HouseOfCandles.pk. These online stores offer a wide selection of scented candles at competitive prices, along with discounts and promotions that attract customers to purchase these products through their platforms.

These candles are one of the trending online products in Pakistan

13. Portable Projectors

Portable projectors are among the most demanded and best-selling online products in Pakistan. These small projectors are designed to be highly portable, making them perfect for presentations, movie nights, and gaming sessions on the go.

A variety of different brands such as Epson, Dell, BenQ, Optoma, and Viewsonic offer a variety of portable projectors, with different features and specifications such as brightness, contrast, resolution, and connectivity.

Portable projectors are available at a variety of online stores in Pakistan such as Markaz, TechBargains.pk, and AVStore.pk.

These online stores offer a wide selection of portable projectors at competitive prices, along with discounts and promotions that attract customers to purchase these products through their platforms.

14. Bluetooth Speakers

Bluetooth speakers are among the most demanded and best-selling online products in Pakistan. These wireless speakers allow users to easily connect their device to the speaker and enjoy music, podcasts, or videos with ease.

Bluetooth speakers come in various sizes, shapes, colors, and wattages to suit different needs and preferences.

Many brands such as Bose, JBL, Sony, and Marshall offer a variety of Bluetooth speakers with different features such as battery life, sound quality, and portability.

Bluetooth speakers are available at a variety of online stores in Pakistan such as Markaz, Audiopro.pk, and TechCafe.pk.

These online stores offer a wide selection of Bluetooth speakers at competitive prices, along with discounts and promotions that attract customers to purchase these products through their platforms.

Undoubtedly, they can be considered the trending online products in Pakistan.

15. Smart Watches

Smart Watches are among the most demanded and best-selling online products in Pakistan. These smartwatches track physical activity, heart rate, sleep patterns, and other health metrics as well as allow users to make phone calls and send text messages without having to use their phones.

Smartwatches come in various sizes, shapes, colors, and features to suit different needs and preferences. Popular brands that offer these watches include Apple, Samsung, Fitbit, Garmin, and Huawei.

Smartwatches are available at a variety of online stores in Pakistan such as Markaz, TheTechStore.pk, and GadgetsShop.pk.

These online stores offer a wide selection of smartwatches at competitive prices, along with discounts and promotions that attract customers to purchase these products through their platforms.

16. Food Items

Food items are among the most demanded and best online selling products in Pakistan. These food items include a variety of snacks, beverages, and other edible goods that can be easily purchased from online stores.

Popular food items include chips, cookies, chocolates, energy drinks, tea & coffee, nuts & seeds, and more.

17. Books

Books are among the most demanded and hot selling products in Pakistan. These books range from educational textbooks to fiction novels and provide knowledge and entertainment for readers of all ages.

Popular book genres include romance, fantasy, science fiction, non-fiction, self-help, and more.

Books are available at a variety of online stores in Pakistan such as Markaz, Readings.pk, and BookLore.pk.

These online stores offer a wide selection of books at competitive prices, along with discounts and promotions that attract customers to purchase these products through their platforms.

18. Party Supplies

Party supplies are considered as trendy products in Pakistan to sell.

This category includes a diverse range of items such as balloons, banners, tableware, decorations, and party favors.

Online platforms provide a convenient way for individuals to browse through a wide variety of options, themes, and designs to suit their specific party needs.

Customers can easily compare prices, read reviews, and find unique or personalized party supplies that may not be readily available in local stores.

The ease of online shopping and the ability to have party supplies delivered to their doorstep make it a preferred choice for event planners, party organizers, and individuals hosting parties or celebrations.

19. Musical Instruments

Online platforms have made it easier for people in Pakistan to access and purchase musical instruments.

They are currently considered the trendy products in Pakistan.

This category includes guitars, keyboards, drums, violins, and other instruments.

Online shopping allows musicians, music enthusiasts, and beginners to explore a vast selection of instruments, compare prices, and read product reviews to make informed decisions.

Customers can also access detailed product information and specifications, making it easier to find the right instrument for their skill level and musical preferences.

Online platforms provide the convenience of doorstep delivery, eliminating the need to search through physical stores and allowing individuals to pursue their musical passions from the comfort of their homes.

20. Fitness Wear

One of the top trending products in Pakistan is fitness wear.

The demand for fitness wear has seen significant growth in the online market in Pakistan.

This category includes activewear, sports shoes, workout accessories, and fitness gear.

Online platforms offer a wide range of brands, styles, and sizes to cater to various fitness activities and preferences.

Customers can explore different options, compare prices, and read reviews to find high-quality and comfortable fitness wear.

The convenience of online shopping allows individuals to access a broader selection of fitness wear options, making it easier to find the right clothing and accessories for their workout routines or active lifestyles.

21. Outdoor Clothing

Pakistan's diverse landscape and the popularity of outdoor activities have driven the demand for outdoor clothing in the online market.

This category includes hiking gear, camping apparel, outdoor footwear, and accessories.

Online platforms offer a wide variety of outdoor clothing options to cater to different weather conditions and outdoor pursuits.

Customers can explore renowned brands, compare prices, and read customer reviews to ensure the quality and durability of the products.

Online shopping also allows individuals to access niche or specialized outdoor clothing that may not be easily found in local stores, providing them with a wider range of choices for their outdoor adventures.

22. Home Security Systems

The growing importance of home security has fueled the demand for home security systems in Pakistan's online market.

This category includes security cameras, alarms, smart door locks, and other related devices.

Online platforms provide a convenient way for individuals to research, compare, and purchase home security systems that best suit their needs.

Customers can access detailed product information, read reviews, and seek expert advice before making a decision.

The ease of online shopping, coupled with the desire for enhanced safety and peace of mind, drives the popularity of purchasing home security systems online.

23. DIY And Tools

The popularity of do-it-yourself (DIY) projects and home improvement has contributed to the demand for DIY tools and equipment in Pakistan's online market.

This category includes power tools, hand tools, DIY kits, and accessories.

Online platforms offer a wide range of options, allowing customers to easily find the right tools for their DIY projects.

Detailed product descriptions, customer reviews, and competitive prices make it easier for DIY enthusiasts and professionals to make informed decisions.

The convenience of online shopping and doorstep delivery further enhance the appeal of purchasing DIY tools and equipment online.

24. Home Entertainment

Are you looking for the top trending products in Pakistan to sell?


Online platforms in Pakistan cater to the demand for home entertainment products, including televisions, audio systems, streaming devices, and gaming consoles.

Customers can explore a wide range of brands, models, and specifications online, enabling them to compare features, read reviews, and make informed decisions based on their preferences and budget.

Online shopping offers the convenience of doorstep delivery, eliminating the need to visit physical stores and allowing individuals to set up their home entertainment systems with ease.

The availability of a wide selection of products and competitive prices make online platforms an attractive choice for home entertainment purchases.

26. School And College Supplies

Online platforms provide a convenient solution for purchasing school and college supplies in Pakistan.

This category includes backpacks, notebooks, pens, calculators, and other essential items.

Students and parents can easily browse through a wide variety of options, compare prices, and make purchases from the comfort of their homes.

Online shopping saves time and offers a broader range of products compared to physical stores, ensuring that students have access to the necessary supplies for their educational needs.

The convenience of doorstep delivery adds to the appeal of online shopping for school and college supplies.

27. Home Storage And Organization

The demand for home storage and organization solutions has increased as people prioritize decluttering and maximizing space in their homes.

Online platforms offer a wide array of storage containers, organizers, shelving units, and closet accessories.

Customers can explore different designs, sizes, and materials to find the most suitable options for their organizational needs.

The convenience of online shopping allows individuals to browse through various products, read customer reviews, and compare prices before making a purchase.

Online platforms provide access to a broader range of home storage and organization solutions, enabling customers to find the best products to create a well-organized and functional living space.

27. Toys And Games

Online platforms in Pakistan cater to the demand for toys and games, offering a wide variety of options for children of all ages.

This category includes board games, puzzles, building blocks, remote-controlled toys, and video games.

Online shopping provides convenience for parents and gift buyers, allowing them to browse through different brands, compare prices, and read reviews before making a purchase decision.

The availability of a vast selection of toys and games online ensures that customers can find age-appropriate and engaging options for children.

The convenience of doorstep delivery adds to the popularity of purchasing toys and games online.

28. Travel Accessories

One of the best products to sell online in Pakistan is travel accessories.


Travel enthusiasts often turn to online platforms to purchase travel accessories in Pakistan.

This category includes luggage, travel bags, travel organizers, travel adapters, and other travel essentials.

Online shopping allows customers to explore different brands, sizes, and features to find the most suitable travel accessories for their needs.

The convenience of online purchasing eliminates the need to physically visit multiple stores, saving time and effort.

Customers can read product reviews, compare prices, and choose from a wide range of options, ensuring that they have the necessary travel accessories for a comfortable and organized journey.

29. Art And Craft Supplies

Arts and craft supplies are one of the best products to sell online in Pakistan.
Online platforms offer a wide range of art and craft supplies to cater to artists, hobbyists, and students in Pakistan.

This category includes paints, brushes, canvases, sketchbooks, and other crafting materials.

Online shopping provides easy access to a diverse selection of art supplies, allowing customers to find the specific products they need for their projects.

Customers can compare prices, read product reviews, and explore different brands to ensure they are purchasing high-quality materials.

Online platforms also provide access to tutorials, tips, and inspiration, enhancing the overall experience for art and craft enthusiasts.

30. Pet Supplies

The demand for pet supplies has seen significant growth in the online market in Pakistan.

This category includes pet food, grooming products, toys, accessories, and other pet-related items.

Online platforms offer a convenient way for pet owners to access a wide variety of pet supplies, catering to the specific needs of different types of pets.

Customers can explore various brands, compare prices, and read product reviews to ensure they are providing the best care for their pets.

The convenience of online shopping and doorstep delivery makes it easier for pet owners to replenish their supplies regularly without the need for store visits.

These are just a few examples of the most selling online products in Pakistan. It's important to note that consumer preferences may vary, and the popularity of specific items can change over time.

It's advisable to consult reliable market research and online platforms for the most up-to-date information on the best-selling products in Pakistan's online market.

4. Food & Groceries

  • Packaged snacks, beverages, and pantry staples are frequently purchased online, catering to the growing trend of online grocery shopping2

These products reflect both traditional values and modern lifestyle choices prevalent in Pakistan today.

In conclusion, Markaz offers a unique opportunity for individuals to explore the booming e-commerce market in Pakistan by providing access to trending, demanding, and winning products—all without requiring any initial investment.

Some Examples Of Online Work For Earning Without Investment

We’ve covered top selling products online. Now let’s talk about some easy ways to earn online without investment.

While they are great options for free online work without investment involved in the picture, you will still be required to put in the work and be a self-initiator for this to work.

Below is a list of easy way to earn online without investment.

1. Virtual Assistance:

Many entrepreneurs and small business owners are in need of virtual assistance to manage their day-to-day tasks.

2. Online Surveys:

Companies are willing to pay for consumer opinions and feedback.

3. Data Entry:

There are companies that hire people to do data entry work from home.

4. Online Micro-Tasks:

Some websites like Amazon Turk or Clickworker offer small online tasks that you can do for money.

5. Online Transcription:

You can transcribe audio or video files for businesses, podcasters, and other content creators.

6. Online Translation:

If you are fluent in more than one language, you can offer your services as a translator.

7. Online Customer Service:

Some companies hire remote customer service representatives to handle customer inquiries and complaints.

8. Online Game Testing:

If you are a gamer, you may be able to earn money by testing new games and providing feedback to the developers.

9. Online Social Media Management:

If you have experience with social media marketing, you can offer your services to businesses looking to improve their online presence.

10. Online Podcasting:

If you have a passion for creating audio content, you can start a podcast and monetize it through sponsorships, advertisers, and merchandise sales.

So which free online work without investment option would you be willing to take?

Frequently Asked Questions: What to sell online in Pakistan

What are the top selling products in Pakistan?

The top selling products in Pakistan include smartphones, fashion and clothing, electronics and accessories, beauty and personal care products, home appliances, books, and sports and fitness products. These products are in high demand among online shoppers in Pakistan and online retailers such as Markaz have capitalized on this by offering a wide range of products and services that cater to the needs of their customers.

Moreover, the top selling products in Pakistan may vary depending on factors such as seasons, holidays, and trends.

For example, during the festive season such as Eid, there is a high demand for traditional Pakistani dresses such as shalwar kameez, sarees, and kurta pajama.

During the summer season, there is a high demand for air conditioners, refrigerators, and other cooling appliances.

Similarly, during the winter season, there is a high demand for heaters, blankets, and other warming appliances.

Therefore, the top selling products in Pakistan may vary depending on the time of the year, customer preferences, and trends in the market. Nevertheless, the e-commerce industry in Pakistan is growing, and online retailers are continuously expanding their product offerings and services to cater to the diverse needs of their customers.

What sells quickest online?

There is no definite answer to this question since it largely depends on the product and the market conditions. However, some consumer products that often sell quickly online include souvenirs, clothing, and home goods.

Remember that it's important to stay ahead of the trends if you want to ensure that your products are selling well online. By keeping an eye on current trends and developing new marketing strategies, you can increase the chances of your products selling quickly and efficiently.

Having said that you can resell from the following products online with the Markaz App for quick sales:

  • Portable Projector
  • Smart Watch
  • Vegetable Chopper
  • Bluetooth Speaker
  • Neck Massager

What can I sell for extra income?

There are a lot of things that can be sold for extra income, but some of the more popular options include:

1. Services - If you have any skills or talents that you can offer others, you may be able to start charging for them. This could include anything from cleaning to tutoring.

2. Digital products - If you have a skill or knowledge that can be put into digital form, you may be able to start selling your content online. This could include eBooks, articles, or even courses.

3. Local services - If you live in a city or town with a lot of people and activity, there are likely to be businesses that need help - from construction workers to plumbers. You could start offering your services to these businesses, and charge a fee for your services.

4. Merchandise - If you have any craft skills or knowledge that you can put into merchandise form, you may be able to start selling these products online. This could include T-shirts and other apparel items, as well as home decor items like magnets and prints.

Each of these options has its own set of benefits and drawbacks, which is why it's important to do your research before starting any kind of business venture. With a little effort and creativity, there's no reason why anything couldn't become an extra source of income!
